versions.name: Camp Raven Knob
versions.address: 266 Raven Knob Road, Mount Airy, NC 27030
versions.summary: Scouts BSA resident camp operated by Old Hickory Council, set in the Blue Ridge Mountains near Mount Airy, North Carolina.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
